purpose: To convince small businesses and startups to sign up for HubSpot's free CRM software by highlighting its features, benefits, and ease of use, ultimately driving user acquisition for the free product.
importantSections: See How CRM Can Propel Your Growth
Maximize Value With Free Growth Tools Included
summary: This landing page promotes HubSpot's free CRM software, targeting startups and small businesses with promises of unlimited growth potential and ease of use. It details key features like AI assistance, data management, and integrations, encouraging sign-ups by showcasing value without cost. The page also offers a glimpse into paid plans and additional free growth tools.
